title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus GPU cluster, addressing its lack of vertical integration in chips and infrastructure. The video argues this deal reflects broader competition shifting from model benchmarks toward control of hardware, energy, and datacenters.
